title: BetterWay
description: This is a Vanilla+ modpack. It adds new blocks, biomes, items and animal species. Which Mojang has not added.
body:
# 📖 Description

This is a Vanilla+ modpack. It adds new blocks, biomes, items and animals. That Mojang did not add. With over 100+ mods there is a lot of variety here. You can also play with your friends when the server version is ready. The modpack is also easy to customize. But if it has been customized, I can't give support for it. For example, if it suddenly crashes or breaks. Some of our top mods are "Alex Mobs", "Biomes O' Plenty" and a small mod called "Goblin Traders".

# 💻 Features (not all Features here xD)

✔️ New Dimensions: The Aether

✔️ New Mobs: Alex Mobs and more.

✔️ New Items: Supplementaries and more.

✔️ Controller support (Xbox, PlayStation and etc...)

✔️ Better Performence for older computers

# ⛑️ Support

You can write to me here on Discord "nikita_cloud".

# Server Version
[BetterWay v2.0 Server](https://www.mediafire.com/file/t7g117dn9zd9h4f/BetterWay_v2.0_Server_-_1.20.1.zip/file)

[BetterWay v2.1 Server](https://www.mediafire.com/file/mlxeg1r1jqw67xc/BetterWay_-_v2.1_-_1.20.1.zip/file)
